title: UT4 MapSpec v0
description: Compact, LLM-authorable description of a UT4 arena. Compiled to T3D and imported into a .umap. v0 targets boxy arenas extruded from a 2D layout (e.g. an ElimPlus top-down icon). Coordinate system: Unreal units (~1cm), right-handed, +X forward / +Y right / +Z up. Ground plane is z=0.

name.description: Map asset name, e.g. DM-Claude01. Becomes the .umap filename.

defaults.description: Fallback dimensions/materials applied when a room/wall omits them. All tunable; calibrate against real UT4 movement (jump height, doorway clearance) after first playtest.

wallMaterial.description: Material path, e.g. /Game/RestrictedAssets/.../M_Wall. Empty = editor default.

id.description: Unique room id, referenced by doorways.

min.description: Interior AABB min [x,y,z]; z is the floor level.

max.description: Interior AABB max [x,y,z]; z is the ceiling level.

walls.description: Which perimeter walls to build. Omit a side to leave it fully open (e.g. two rooms sharing a wall).

doorways.description: Openings in a room wall. v0 builds the wall as segments that leave a gap (no CSG subtract) for robustness.

center.description: Offset of opening center along the wall, from room center (uu).

sill.description: Height of opening bottom above the floor (uu). 0 = floor-level doorway; >0 = window.

class.description: UT class or Blueprint. e.g. UTPickupHealth, UTArmor, or a weapon BP like BP_Sniper. Weapon pickups on maps are BP subclasses (BP_Sniper_C) — match via IsChildOf, not equality.

location.description: Place ~32-48uu above the floor so the capsule doesn't spawn embedded.

lights.description: Without lights + a lighting build the map renders unlit. At least one per room recommended for the PoC.

source.description: Provenance — which ElimPlus layout this was generated from, and any generation notes.
